NAVAREA XIX 114/19
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 131830 UTC OCT 2019
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N. EAST OF 5W

 65-47.5N - 007-43.0E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
 65-39.4N - 007-38.5E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 65-25.5N - 007-08.2E TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC
 65-12.2N - 006-22.6E DEEPSEA BERGEN
 65-21.7N - 007 20.1E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 110/19
